name: subwatch
title: Subwatch
description: Turn subscription chaos into financial harmony
author: nirgn

commands.name: add-subscription
commands.title: Add New Subscription
commands.subtitle: Subwatch
commands.description: Add a new subscription to your Subwatch calendar

preferences.name: subwatchApiKey
preferences.title: Subwatch - API Key
preferences.description: Your Subwatch api key, you can find it in the Subwatch platform in the integrations page.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
